title: Shattering Festive Thai Chwinamul Bowl
description: A rich and savory Thai-inspired dish featuring tender chwinamul, succulent bhuna, and a medley of aromatic spices. Perfect for a festive night in with friends and family.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 3 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chwinamul and bhuna, and cook until the chwinamul is tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and brown sugar, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the fresh cilantro and basil.
Season the dish with salt to taste.
Serve the shattering festive Thai chwinamul bowl hot, garnished with additional cilantro and basil if desired.
Garnish with toasted peanuts or cashews for added crunch.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a filling meal.
